title: Grilled Uruguayan Beans
description: A simple and delicious recipe featuring tender beans grilled to perfection, inspired by traditional Uruguayan cuisine.

ingredients.name: white beans (such as cannellini or navy beans)
grill seasoning (such as paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper)

instructions: Rinse the white beans and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together butter, grill seasoning, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the butter mixture to the white beans and toss to coat.
Place the white beans on the grill and cook for about 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until slightly charred and tender.
Remove the beans from the grill and let them cool slightly.
Serve the grilled beans hot, garnished with optional gentle herbs if desired.
